_comment: Kerne Protocol public address registry for Base mainnet (chain 8453). Curated public mirror: contains only on-chain-public facts (contract names, addresses, types, explorer links, verification status). Operational and internal records are kept in Kerne's working repository and are out of scope here.

admin.role: Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on the protocol contracts

skUSD.note: Redeployed 2026-07-03 from the prepared skUSD source to reset a distorted share-price accounting state (the prior vault's shares had drifted far from par). Holds the staked kUSD (asset = kUSD 0x5C2EfdF0...0AA3). The prior deployment 0xdEd74F7E...09DB4 is retired (residual dust only) and recorded under retired.skUSD_v1. Sourcify-verified (partial match) 2026-07-04 and source-verified on BaseScan 2026-07-10 (Etherscan v2 standard-json-input; compiler 0.8.24, optimizer disabled, viaIR, cancun). The contracts/skUSD source bundle was refreshed on 2026-07-11 to mirror this live deployment (verified byte-for-byte against Sourcify).

KUSDPSM.type: Peg Stability Module (USDC -> kUSD mint; holds kUSD MINTER_ROLE)
KUSDPSM.note: Live mint PSM redeployed 2026-07-10 from the frozen external-audit commit so the deployed bytecode matches the source under audit; configuration mirrors the prior instance. Sourcify exact match (creation + runtime); BaseScan native verification pending. The prior mint PSM 0x07eBb486...5993 (2026-06-16 ceremony) had MINTER_ROLE revoked and is retained temporarily as a kUSD->USDC redeem reserve while its USDC reserve migrates (see retired.KUSDPSM_2026_06_16_redeemReserve). The Proof of Reserves sums all three PSM reserves through the migration window.

KerneVault.type: Collateral vault v2 (ERC-4626; holds kUSD MINTER_ROLE)
KerneVault.note: Live deposit/mint vault deployed in the 2026-06-16 ceremony. Supersedes v1 0x8005bc7A...F2AC (retired; MINTER_ROLE revoked), which the Proof of Reserves still attests until reserves migrate. Public WETH deposits intentionally closed pre-launch.

KERNE.type: Governance token (canonical v2, 1,000,000,000 fixed supply, no mint function)

retired._comment: Superseded deployments, kept for historical reconciliation. Do not use for minting.
retired._kusdpsm20260616Note: The 2026-06-16 mint PSM had MINTER_ROLE revoked when the 2026-07-10 redeploy went live (Safe-executed grant/revoke); it no longer mints. It is retained temporarily as a kUSD->USDC redeem reserve while its USDC reserve migrates to the live PSM, and its reserve stays in the Proof of Reserves sum until then.
retired._redeemReserveNote: KUSDPSM_v1 had MINTER_ROLE revoked in the 2026-06-16 ceremony; it no longer mints but is retained as the kUSD->USDC redeem reserve backing residual kUSD. KerneVault_v1 is the retired vault the Proof of Reserves currently attests.
retired._skUSDNote: skUSD_v1 (0xdEd74F7E...09DB4, deployed 2026-05-11) was retired 2026-07-03 and superseded by skUSD 0x96F5102C...DfA14: the staking vault was redeployed from the prepared source to reset a distorted share-price accounting state. skUSD_v1 holds only residual dust and must not be used.

notes: Live state (TVL, kUSD supply, role grants, peg) is authoritative on-chain. Verify any value with the cast calls in HOW_TO_VERIFY_KERNE.md or run scripts/verify_public_endpoints.sh. Source-vs-deployed drift for contracts with in-development fixes is disclosed in the gaps array of https://kerne.fi/api/risk-status.
